CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC);
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, value) VALUES (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_empty (id INT PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE test_duplicates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC);
CREATE TABLE test_multiple (id INT PRIMARY KEY, group_id INT, value NUMERIC);
INSERT INTO test_multiple (id, group_id, value) VALUES (1, 1, 10.0);
INSERT INTO test_multiple (id, group_id, value) VALUES (2, 1, 20.0);
INSERT INTO test_multiple (id, group_id, value) VALUES (3, 2, 30.0);
INSERT INTO test_multiple (id, group_id, value) VALUES (4, 2, NULL);
SELECT group_id, VAR_POP(value) FROM test_multiple GROUP BY group_id;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id INT PRIMARY KEY, group_id INT);
CREATE TABLE test_values (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC);
SELECT j.group_id, VAR_POP(v.value) FROM test_join j JOIN test_values v ON j.id = v.id GROUP BY j.group_id;
